# Brio

> Lightweight declarative JavaScript framework for multi-page websites and web apps. Behaviour via data-attributes. No build step, no dependencies.

## Docs

- [BRIO.md](BRIO.md): condensed reference for AI assistants (~1500 tokens)
- [docs/brio.md](docs/brio.md): full API reference
- [docs/reference.html](docs/reference.html): interactive reference with live demos
- [README.md](README.md): getting started and install

## Install

Modular (recommended for projects):

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="brio.css">
<script src="utils.js" defer></script>
<script src="actions.js" defer></script>
<script src="binding.js" defer></script>
<script src="dialogs.js" defer></script>
<script src="feedback.js" defer></script>
<script src="project.js" defer></script>
```

CDN (bundled):

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pepijngieles/brio@v0.1.0/dist/brio.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pepijngieles/brio@v0.1.0/brio.js" defer></script>
```
